description: Consolidate all plugin-generated artifacts under .claude-pipeline/ directory, add automatic .gitignore management, and remove all references to tasks/

qualityGates.references: ! grep -rn 'tasks/' skills/ agents/ config/ commands/ hooks/ --include='*.md' --include='*.sh' --include='*.json' | grep -v 'TaskCreate\|TaskUpdate\|TaskGet\|TaskList\|TaskStop\|TaskOutput\|task tools\|multi-step tasks'

stories.title: PRDs write to .claude-pipeline/prds/
stories.description: As a plugin user, I want PRDs saved under .claude-pipeline/prds/ so that all plugin artifacts are in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: /prd skill (skills/prd/SKILL.md) saves PRDs to .claude-pipeline/prds/prd-[feature-name].md
/prd skill instructs agent to create .claude-pipeline/prds/ directory if it doesn't exist (mkdir -p)
All references to tasks/ as output directory in skills/prd/SKILL.md are replaced with .claude-pipeline/prds/
Output section shows Location: .claude-pipeline/prds/ and Filename: prd-[feature-name].md
All quality gates pass
stories.notes: This is a Markdown-only change to skills/prd/SKILL.md. No shell scripts to modify.

stories.title: Add .gitignore management instructions to /prd and /plan-stories skills
stories.description: As a plugin user, I want .claude-pipeline/ automatically added to my project's .gitignore when I first use the pipeline, so I don't have to remember to do it myself.
acceptanceCriteria: skills/prd/SKILL.md includes a step instructing the agent to ensure .claude-pipeline/ is in .gitignore (with exact idempotency pattern from PRD)
skills/plan-stories/SKILL.md includes the same .gitignore management step
Instructions specify: only inside a git repo, use grep -qxF for exact-line matching, handle missing trailing newline, add comment header '# claude-godmode pipeline artifacts'
Instructions specify opt-out: skip if .gitignore contains '# claude-godmode: unmanaged'
Instructions are idempotent — running multiple times must not duplicate the entry
If .gitignore doesn't exist, create it with the entry
All quality gates pass
stories.notes: Markdown-only changes to two SKILL.md files. Add a new step section with the .gitignore management instructions and idempotency pattern. Do NOT modify session-start.sh.

stories.title: Update /plan-stories references and add prdSource field
stories.description: As a plugin maintainer, I want /plan-stories to reference the correct PRD location and track which PRD generated each stories.json.
acceptanceCriteria: skills/plan-stories/SKILL.md reads PRDs from .claude-pipeline/prds/ instead of tasks/
Output format JSON in SKILL.md includes prdSource field at root level (e.g. "prdSource": ".claude-pipeline/prds/prd-feature-name.md")
Conversion rules section includes: 'prdSource: path to the PRD file consumed'
stories.json output path remains .claude-pipeline/stories.json (no change)
All quality gates pass
stories.notes: Markdown-only changes to skills/plan-stories/SKILL.md. Update the Output Format JSON example, Conversion Rules, and any PRD path references.

stories.title: Update all documentation and clean up plugin repo
stories.description: As a plugin user or contributor, I want all docs to reflect the new artifact structure so there's no confusion about where files go.
acceptanceCriteria: config/INSTRUCTIONS.md — all tasks/ references for artifact output replaced with .claude-pipeline/prds/
README.md — any artifact output path references updated
commands/godmode.md — pipeline description reflects new paths
skills/execute/SKILL.md — verify all paths reference .claude-pipeline/ (fix if needed)
agents/executor.md — verify paths reference .claude-pipeline/ (fix if needed)
Move tasks/prd-consolidate-pipeline-artifacts.md to .claude-pipeline/prds/prd-consolidate-pipeline-artifacts.md
Delete the tasks/ directory from the plugin repo
Update prdSource field in .claude-pipeline/stories.json to .claude-pipeline/prds/prd-consolidate-pipeline-artifacts.md after moving the PRD file
Verify README.md has no tasks/ artifact path references (no changes expected)
grep -rn 'tasks/' across skills/ agents/ config/ commands/ hooks/ returns zero results for artifact output paths (excluding unrelated uses like 'TaskCreate' tool references)
All quality gates pass
stories.notes: Fixed one tasks/ reference in config/INSTRUCTIONS.md example workflow. Verified README.md, godmode.md, execute/SKILL.md, executor.md had no tasks/ artifact references. Moved PRD to .claude-pipeline/prds/, deleted tasks/ directory, updated prdSource field.

stories.title: Update archive structure with PRD tracking
stories.description: As a plugin user, I want archived pipeline runs to include the source PRD so that the full context of a previous run is preserved.
acceptanceCriteria: skills/plan-stories/SKILL.md archive section instructs copying the source PRD identified by prdSource field in stories.json
Archive path remains .claude-pipeline/archive/YYYY-MM-DD-feature-name/
Archive includes: stories.json, progress.txt, and the source PRD file (not all PRDs)
Archive section references prdSource field to determine which PRD to copy
All quality gates pass
stories.notes: Markdown-only change to skills/plan-stories/SKILL.md archive section. Update the archive instructions to include prdSource-based PRD copying.
